docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $0.00 SERVED APR-16-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAIA, NICHOLAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SETH MARTIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS RAIA IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, SETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAIA, NICHOLAS $4,572.96 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,647.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 06/25/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARTIN, SETH AS TO DEFENDANT RAIA, NICHOLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
